scenario: Our support team wants to auto-summarize inbound tickets.
We need to classify product reviews as positive or negative.
Transcribe customer call recordings for QA.
Detect defective parts on a production line from a camera feed.
Extract line items from uploaded supplier invoices.
Draft first-pass marketing copy for a new product launch.
Identify people named in incident reports and anonymize them.
Generate a voice response for our kiosk that mimics a human operator.
Given a recorded meeting, produce action items with owners.
Build a conversational assistant that can book appointments.
